headline: Is Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISRG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ISRG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Intuitive Surgical, Inc. on MTC’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ISRG. Intuitive Surgical, Inc.’s share was trading at $483.46 as of March 16th. ISRG’s trailing and forward P/E were 59.99 and 47.39 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Intuitive […]

headline: Jim Cramer on Intuitive Surgical: “It’s Just Gotten Too Expensive Per Share”
summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) is one of the stocks mentioned during the show, as we cover everything Jim Cramer said about the oversold market. A caller asked which of the three metrics is most important for the company: procedure growth, system placements, or hospital utilization. Cramer replied: It’s hospital utilization, and what gets me down […]
